review_text:
CAUTION READ 1ST BEFORE CONSIDERING ERASEABLE INC !!! ⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️⚠️

Read this first if you’re considering tattoo removal.

It takes a special level of precision, experience, and attention to detail to properly target tattoo ink, especially colored ink, the way Kristen and her team do. The care they put into their work is truly impressive.

The results I’ve seen are remarkable. The before and after photos speak for themselves. Proof that what they’re doing really works. Seeing those results kept me motivated throughout my own tattoo removal journey, especially knowing they are removing something that was meant to be permanent.

Erasable Inc. truly feels like a one of a kind business. I can understand why they are not franchised or spread across multiple locations, because the level of meticulous work they do would be very hard to duplicate.

I highly recommend Erasable Inc. to anyone thinking about tattoo removal. Thank you Kristen and the team. I’m looking forward to my next session!
review_date_label: Mar 12, 2026 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Mar 12, 2026)

review_text: At first, I was so scared about getting my old microbladed eyebrow tattoos removed… but the minute I walked in, I was impressed. The office was beautiful, spacious, and clean. I first had a consultation with Lacey, and then the procedure.  It exceeded my expectations. The staff were very friendly and professional, and Lacey made me feel very comfortable. She and the staff are wonderful! - Paula
review_date_label: Sep 12, 2025 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Sep 12, 2025)

review_text:
2025 - Still a loyal customer and today had a facial with Aysha!  I had one last month too and she did a full scan of my face - was an eye opener for sure, but that was really cool to see the damage (sad but cool).  Aysha created a plan to bring that youthful glow and undo (as much as possible) the damage over the years (I'm 60).  Today's facial was a bit different and longer than last month - she used some kind of mask (can't remember the name) and I immediately felt tightening of my face after.  Aysha is a true professional and is super knowledgeable.  Signed up for the monthly and can't wait for next month to see what magic she will do.  Oh, and the new location is right across the street from the old and it is beautiful!  Well done Loretta and Kristin (yes same name same spelling as me- automatic bond right there).  So happy to be a customer and so proud of the amazing business and caring team you have built!

2021 - Still going to Erasable Inc for my facials and other treatments.  They have specials all the time to help me save $$. They truly care about their customers and always go the extra mile. Luv ma gurls at EI!!
2020 - I have been going to erasable inc for over a year now.  Started out with tattoo removal (see review about that below) and then decided on other services such as their hydrafacial, botox (which I vowed I would never do...so glad I did), cool sculpting and true flex.  OMG the difference is amazing.  I work out and try to eat healthy most of the time (ice cream is a weakness) and even as a life long athlete, I still would have to work out 2 hours per day to get the results I got from cool sculpting and true flex.  The girls there are warm and welcoming, caring and considerate.  They have a clean healthy environment and are open for business but have done it thoughtfully and strategically for the safety of their patients.  I feel like I have a new family with the staff there.  Luv my EI girls!

2019 - Everyone at Eraseable Inc is incredibly knowledgeable and attentive.   I’m having a tattoo removed and can’t believe the difference from when I first came in.  Just a few more sessions to go and it’s already almost gone!   Got a great package price too that included multiple sessions and it saved me $ instead of paying for each visit.  They’ve got a great set up.   Next...cool sculpting!   Loretta and her team are very friendly and professional!    Thanks you guys!
review_date_label: Aug 23, 2018 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Aug 22, 2025)

review_text: I felt so comfortable and take care of by Laura. I was nervous about the procedure and she explained every step, easing my uncertainty and anxiety. I'm also really pleased with my results.

review_text:
Outstanding Experience!

I had a fantastic experience with Loretta at Eraseable Med Spa. She took the time to thoroughly explain each procedure, including the expected results, costs, and what would work best for my specific needs. I really appreciated her honesty — she even pointed out a few treatments that I wouldn’t benefit much from, which shows she truly has her clients' best interests at heart. I never felt rushed or pressured, and I left feeling informed, comfortable, and confident in my choices. Highly recommend her for anyone looking for personalized, professional care!
review_date_label: Jul 25, 2025 (verified from SerpAPI iso_date, last edited Jul 25, 2025)
